title: Golden Crossover Strategy
author: saketpansari
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Golden Crossover Strategy by saketpansari.
This strategy trades EMA crossovers with an optional trend filter, and works on any timeframe you apply it to (daily, weekly, intraday, etc.).
It is designed for swing-style long-only trading and backtesting.

• It plots three EMAs: • Fast EMA – default 21 periods • Slow EMA – default 50 periods • Trend EMA – default 200 periods (used as a higher timeframe trend filter) • It enters long when the Fast EMA crosses above the Slow EMA, and • It exits when the Fast EMA … What this strategy does?
